stressed.text: You could try a slower breath by the fireplace.
Maybe head to a softer music layer for a few minutes.

tired.text: It might help to rest with quiet night music.
You could keep things simple and write one gratitude line.

restless.text: You could try one short focus block to settle in.
Maybe head to a calm breathing cycle first.

lonely.text: It might help to receive a gentle compliment.
Maybe stay with soft music for a little while.

overwhelmed.text: You could take one 4-4-6 breath cycle first.
Maybe keep it small with one gratitude note.

okay.text: You could keep the mood and drift with soft dawn.
Maybe turn this calm into one focus session.

peaceful.text: You could stay here and enjoy a gentle track.
Maybe carry this feeling into a gratitude note.
